indication: Treatment of locally recurrent metastatic triple negative breast cancer.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved gemcitabine in combination with carboplatin (AUC2) - 21 days for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of locally recurrent metastatic triple negative breast cancer.

document.name: Gemcitabine and CARBOplatin (AUC2) Therapy - 21 days. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Gemcitabine and CARBOplatin (AUC2) Therapy - 21 days, 2023, version number 5, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6832/430_v5_GemcarboAUC2_csa5PxW.pdf
